source_note: Order of the Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission on the verified petition of Northern Indiana Public Service Company LLC (NIPSCO) for approval of a fuel cost adjustment for the February–April 2025 billing cycles under Ind. Code 8-1-2-42, IURC Cause No. 38706 FAC 145, issued January 29, 2025. Listed for reference (metadata-only). PDF at www.in.gov/iurc/files/; case search iurc.portal.in.gov.

findings.title: Approval: $7,862,875
findings.summary: is is $35,292,236 more than NIPSCO’s authorized amount of $407,403,229, which includes $399,540,354 approved in the applicable rate case, plus $7,862,875 of actual TDSIC operating income during the 12 months ended September 30, 2024. findings.summary: will pay $201.92 (excluding taxes), which consists of $180.24 in base charges set in NIPSCO’s last approved rate case (Cause No. 45772), $0.69 in a fuel adjustment clause credit, and $20.99 in non-FAC trackers. 12.
